stops.name: The Wrought-Iron Threshold
stops.story: You push past the heavy gates of the Grand Library, stepping into the foggy moors. The expedition to save your Sanctum begins.

reward.text: Gain +50 Ink Drops and +10 Paper Scraps.

stops.name: The Ashen Crossroads
stops.story: At the intersection of forgotten roads, you trade tales with a wandering merchant for a map that points toward the Ember.

reward.text: Permanent Passive: Organize the Stacks (Hearts) quests now grant +20 XP (was +15).

stops.name: The Whispering Woods
stops.story: The trees here mimic the rustle of pages. You navigate the twisting paths by following the faint scent of old parchment.

stops.name: The Sunken Observatory
stops.story: An abandoned astrologer's tower offers refuge from the elements. You salvage an ancient brass lens from the ruins.

reward.text: Permanent Bonus: +1 Display Slot (Passive Item slot).

stops.name: The Midnight Waystation
stops.story: Huddled by a solitary hearth, you document the strange magic of the outside world. Your notes have never felt more vital.

reward.text: Permanent Passive: Adventure Journal entries now grant +10 Paper Scraps (was +5).

stops.name: The Glass-Still Lake
stops.story: You cross the glassy expanse on a tethered ferry. The mist finally parts, revealing the jagged peaks where the artifact lies.

stops.name: The Echoing Caverns
stops.story: Descending into the dark, you learn to read ancient runes carved into the stone. You recognize the repeating patterns of long epics.

reward.text: Permanent Passive: All books read for a Series grant +15 Ink Drops (was +10).

stops.name: The Weaver's Hollow
stops.story: An exiled moth-silk weaver teaches you how to spin wards from moonlight, protecting your mind from the creeping fog.

reward.text: Permanent Passive: Once per month, ignore any single Shroud penalty or Spoon loss.

stops.name: The Caldera's Core
stops.story: You brave the deepest chamber and claim the Unwritten Ember. Its warmth pulses against your chest, eager to mend your home.

stops.name: The Reawakened Sanctum
stops.story: You return victorious. Pressing the Ember into the floorboards, your domain blooms with renewed, vibrant magic.

reward.text: Permanent Bonus: +1 Adoption Slot (Familiar) and +10 XP for all Dungeon Rooms.
